WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
Toplevel
Properties
display max-views

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Property

WPEPlatformToplevel:max-views

since: 2.0

Declaration 

property max-views: guint [ read, write, construct-only ]

Description [src]

The maximum number of WPEView that can be added to the WPEToplevel. A value of 0 means no limit.

Type: guint
Available since:2.0
Default value1
Getter methodwpe_toplevel_get_max_views()

Flags

Readableyes
Writableyes
Constructno
Construct onlyyes
